drops.title: Buffalo Trace Single Oak Rye Bourbon
drops.summary: First release in the new Single Oak brand, based on winning Barrel #80 from the Single Oak Project. Recreates the mashbill and aging conditions of the 1999 experiment. 375ml bottles, available April 2025.

drops.title: Buffalo Trace Experimental Collection: Low Entry Proof Wheated Bourbon
drops.summary: 28th Experimental Collection release. Explores 105 proof entry (vs typical 114) based on pre-Prohibition practices. Bottled at 107 proof (not 90 like prior releases). 375ml, distillery gift shop only.

drops.title: The Last Drop 27-Year Buffalo Trace Bourbon (Release No. 37)
drops.summary: One of Buffalo Trace's oldest bourbons. Blend of three barrels distilled 1995-1997, aged in Warehouse P. Only 508 bottles worldwide. Part of the 2025 Last Drop Collection. Includes 50ml miniature and tasting book.

drops.title: Four Roses 2025 Limited Edition Small Batch
drops.summary: 18th annual LE release. Blend of 13-year OBSV, 13-year OBSK, 13-year OESV, and 19-year OESV. Non-chill filtered, barrel proof. Online drawing Aug 19-24 for distillery purchase.

drops.title: Russell's Reserve Single Rickhouse Camp Nelson E (2025)
drops.summary: Fourth edition of Single Rickhouse series. From 5th floor of Camp Nelson E (built 1946). Highest proof Russell's Reserve ever released at 128 proof. Non-chill filtered. Sold out online, check retailers.

drops.title: Maker's Mark The Keeper's Release 2025
drops.summary: Wood Finishing Series tribute to warehouse team. Finished with two types of toasted American oak staves: half 5-week finish, half 9-week finish. Blended and bottled at 109.2 proof.

drops.title: Elijah Craig PGA 2025 Quail Hollow Limited Edition
drops.summary: Official Bourbon of the 2025 PGA Championship at Quail Hollow Club, Charlotte NC. Barrels hand-selected from Q and H1 rickhouses paying homage to Quail Hollow's legacy.

drops.title: Maker's Mark Wood Finishing Series: The Stewards Release
drops.summary: Latest release in the Wood Finishing Series, finished with custom wood staves. Aromas of cherry pie and vanilla bean, followed by honey, toasted marshmallow, candied ginger, stone fruit, and salted caramel.

drops.title: Garrison Brothers Lady Bird Cognac Cask Finished Honey Infused Bourbon
drops.summary: 2025 release of 7,000 bottles. Texas Straight Bourbon infused with wildflower honey for 8-9 months, then aged in French Cognac XO casks for 3 years. Released April 4 at distillery, online April 13.

drops.title: Michter's Shenk's Homestead Kentucky Sour Mash 2025
drops.summary: Legacy Series release. Rye-forward with caramel malted barley, aged in 24-month air-dried French oak and 60-month air-dried American oak. Notes of toasted oak, vanilla frosting, caramel, and baked goods.

drops.title: Michter's Bomberger's Declaration Kentucky Straight Bourbon 2025
drops.summary: Legacy Series release finished in Chinquapin and Hungarian oak. Rich chocolate and cherry notes with dark fruit, berry compote, buttered caramel, and maple syrup.

drops.title: Elijah Craig Single Barrel 15-Year-Old Bourbon
drops.summary: Inaugural 15-year single barrel release. Notes of dark fruit, figs, roses, roasted nuts, toasted oak, caramelized sugar, finishing with crème brûlée, ginger, and cloves.

drops.title: Bulleit Bourbon Mesquite Smoked Malt
drops.summary: First Bulleit bourbon without rye. 65% corn, 30% mesquite-smoked malt, 5% malted barley. Notes of caramelized sugar, warm mesquite smoke, sweet vanilla, oak, and BBQ-inspired smokiness.

news.title: Buffalo Trace Launches Two New Experimental Bourbons
news.summary: Buffalo Trace released Single Oak Rye Bourbon (based on winning Barrel #80 from the Single Oak Project) and Low Entry Proof Wheated Bourbon (28th Experimental Collection release). Both available in April 2025.

news.title: Heaven Hill Announces $70M Expansion in Bardstown
news.summary: Heaven Hill investing $70 million to add a new glass spirits bottle manufacturing facility to their Bardstown campus. Enhances vertical integration and bottling capacity control.

news.title: Four Roses Bourbon Sale Finalized at Record $775 Million
news.summary: E. & J. Gallo Winery completed acquisition of Four Roses from Kirin Holdings for up to $775 million - a record price for Kentucky bourbon distillery. Four Roses returns to U.S. family ownership for first time in 80+ years.

news.title: Chilled Magazine Top 10 Drops for April 2025
news.summary: Monthly roundup featuring Lost Lantern Spring Collection, Michter's Legacy Series, Elijah Craig 15-Year, and Bulleit Mesquite Smoked Malt among notable releases.
